brasilia.title: Discover Brasília
brasilia.subtitle: Explore the capital of Brazil while you're here

cathedral.description: An iconic modernist cathedral designed by Oscar Niemeyer. Its stunning architecture features 16 curved concrete columns and beautiful stained glass.

congress.description: The seat of Brazil's federal government, featuring two iconic towers and two dome-shaped buildings. A masterpiece of modernist architecture.

jk.description: A memorial dedicated to Juscelino Kubitschek, the founder of Brasília. Features exhibits about his life and the construction of the city.

parque.description: One of the largest urban parks in the world, perfect for walking, cycling, picnics, and outdoor activities. Features a beautiful lake.

nacional.description: A natural oasis with crystal-clear mineral water pools, hiking trails, and abundant wildlife. Perfect for a refreshing swim.

pontao.description: A vibrant waterfront area with numerous restaurants, bars, and cafes. Perfect for sunset views and enjoying local cuisine.

estadio.description: A stunning stadium with a modern design, hosting major football matches and events. A symbol of Brazil's passion for football. We highly recommend booking the tour in advance.

jardim.description: A beautiful botanical garden showcasing the diverse flora of the Cerrado biome. Features walking trails and a peaceful atmosphere.

feira.description: A popular weekend fair at the base of the TV Tower, featuring local crafts, food, and live performances. Great for souvenirs.

privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.intro: Your privacy matters to us. This notice explains how we handle the personal information collected through our wedding website.

whatWeCollect.title: What We Collect
whatWeCollect.content: We collect your name, email address (optional), number of attendees, age groups of attendees, and any dietary restrictions or allergies you share with us through the RSVP form.

whyWeCollect.title: Why We Collect It
whyWeCollect.content: We use this information solely to organize our wedding — to manage the guest list, plan seating, coordinate catering, and communicate important event details with you.

howWeStore.title: How We Store It
howWeStore.content: Your data is stored securely on Supabase, a trusted cloud platform with encryption at rest and in transit. Access is restricted through row-level security policies and secure authentication.

whoHasAccess.title: Who Has Access
whoHasAccess.content: Only Olívia and Esteban (the couple) have administrative access to the guest data. Your information will never be shared with, sold to, or disclosed to third parties.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.content: You can update your RSVP and personal information at any time through the website. If you'd like to request the deletion of your data, please contact us directly.

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.content: All personal data collected through this website will be permanently deleted after the wedding and any related follow-up communications are complete.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about how your data is handled, please reach out to us at oliviaestebanr@gmail.com.
